x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Work notes are the primary content source for Now Assist Major Incident summaries and stakeholder briefings. High P1 work note coverage gives the AI rich timeline context.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Require work notes on all P1 incidents throughout the lifecycle. Add a UI policy prompting for work notes at key state transitions. Now Assist Major Incident summaries and stakeholder briefings are generated from work note content stored in sys_journal_field.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2c
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Work notes are the primary content source for Now Assist Major Incident summaries and stakeholder briefings. High P1 work note coverage gives the AI rich timeline context.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Major Incident Communication Quality</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // P1 incidents total
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    gaTotal.addQuery('priority', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No P1 incidents found',
            finding: 'No P1 incidents found. Major incident communication quality cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    // Count distinct P1 incidents that have work notes via sys_journal_field
    // work_notes are stored as journal entries, not a field on incident directly
    var p1Incidents = {};
    var grInc = new GlideRecord('incident');
    grInc.addQuery('priority', 1);
    grInc.query();
    while (grInc.next()) {
        p1Incidents[grInc.getUniqueValue()] = true;
    }

    var p1SysIds = Object.keys(p1Incidents);
    var withNotes = 0;

    if (p1SysIds.length > 0) {
        // Sample check — for large P1 populations check in batches
        var batchSize = Math.min(p1SysIds.length, 500);
        var gaJournal = new GlideAggregate('sys_journal_field');
        gaJournal.addQuery('name', 'incident');
        gaJournal.addQuery('element', 'work_notes');
        gaJournal.addQuery('document_id', 'IN', p1SysIds.slice(0, batchSize).join(','));
        gaJournal.addAggregate('COUNT', 'document_id');
        gaJournal.groupBy('document_id');
        gaJournal.query();
        while (gaJournal.next()) {
            withNotes++;
        }
    }

    var pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((withNotes / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = pct + '% of P1 incidents have work notes (' + withNotes + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of P1 incidents have work notes. Now Assist Major Incident summaries and stakeholder briefings have sufficient communication history to generate from.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of P1 incidents have work notes (target: 70%). Now Assist Major Incident AI summaries will have limited communication context.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of P1 incidents have work notes. Now Assist Major Incident summaries are generated from work note content — insufficient notes means poor AI summary quality.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005974</number>
<order>350</order>
<remediation_guidance>Require work notes on all P1 incidents throughout the lifecycle. Add a UI policy prompting for work notes at key state transitions. Now Assist Major Incident summaries and stakeholder briefings are generated from work note content stored in sys_journal_field.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c2c</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
